overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a stormy grassland prairie at night. Dark storm clouds cover the sky with occasional lightning illuminating the landscape and revealing the moon briefly.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass under stormy skies

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the prairie grass
tall green prairie grass lining the left side of the path
tall green prairie grass lining the right side of the path
dark heavy storm clouds covering the night sky
rolling hills visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through an open grassland prairie at night. Dark storm clouds fill the sky while tall grass sways on both sides of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling grassland hills with dirt path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the path as the terrain becomes slightly more elevated

segments.scene_description: The journey continues through the rolling grassland with the path winding toward distant hills on the left. The storm clouds remain heavy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy grassland with brief lightning illumination

events.description: lightning flash briefly illuminates the scene revealing the full moon through the clouds

agents.ego_description: walking along the path as lightning flashes and briefly lights up the landscape

entered.detail: bright full moon visible through the clouds during the lightning flash

segments.scene_description: A sudden lightning flash illuminates the stormy sky, briefly revealing the moon before the clouds cover it again. The character continues walking along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with character facing camera

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face the camera directly

agents.ego_description: stops walking and turns to face the camera, standing still and looking directly at the viewer

segments.scene_description: The character abruptly stops and turns to face the camera, standing motionless in the tall grass. The stormy sky and distant hills remain visible behind him.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path continuing into the distance

events.description: character turns back around and resumes walking forward along the path

agents.ego_description: turns away from the camera and continues walking along the dirt path into the grassland

segments.scene_description: The character turns back and resumes walking away from the camera along the path. The landscape opens up with distant hills now visible straight ahead under the dark stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy grassland prairie at night that culminates in a direct encounter with the protagonist. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path, flanked by tall swaying grass under a heavy canopy of dark storm clouds. As the path winds toward distant hills, a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the sky and briefly reveals the moon before the clouds close in once more. The character then abruptly stops and turns to face the camera, standing motionless against the backdrop of the rolling terrain and turbulent sky. Finally, he turns back and resumes his journey, walking away as the landscape opens up to reveal the distant hills straight ahead.
